Model Comparison:** The models likely differed in analysis style. *llama-small* provided a straightforward answer that convinced an uncertain participant. *llama-sft* (presumably fine-tuned) offered a more detailed, reasoning-based analysis, as shown by the second participant's summary mentioning how the AI distinguished TTP from leukemia based on specific clinical features (fever, neurological deficits).
